description: Scatter of interstate trips made against win rate per active club. Derived in-spec: per-team games, wins, and interstate trips.

transform.calculate: datum.home_team == 'Brisbane Broncos' ? 'Broncos' :datum.home_team == 'Melbourne Storm' ? 'Storm' :datum.home_team == 'Penrith Panthers' ? 'Panthers' :datum.home_team == 'Parramatta Eels' ? 'Eels' :datum.home_team == 'South Sydney Rabbitohs' ? 'Rabbitohs' :(datum.home_team == 'Sydney Roosters' || datum.home_team == 'Sydney City Roosters') ? 'Roosters' :datum.home_team == 'Manly Warringah Sea Eagles' ? 'Cowboys' :datum.home_team == 'St George Illawarra Dragons' ? 'Dragons' :datum.home_team == 'St George Dragons' ? 'St George' :datum.home_team == 'Illawarra Steelers' ? 'Illawarra' :(datum.home_team == 'Canterbury Bankstown Bulldogs' || datum.home_team == 'Bulldogs') ? 'Bulldogs' :(datum.home_team == 'Cronulla Sutherland Sharks' || datum.home_team == 'Sharks') ? 'Sharks' :datum.home_team == 'Wests Tigers' ? 'Wests Tigers' :datum.home_team == 'Western Suburbs Magpies' ? 'Western Suburbs' :datum.home_team == 'Balmain Tigers' ? 'Balmain' :(datum.home_team == 'Auckland Warriors' || datum.home_team == 'New Zealand Warriors' || datum.home_team == 'Warriors') ? 'Warriors' :datum.home_team == 'Gold Coast Chargers' ? 'Gold Coast Chargers' :datum.home_team == 'Gold Coast Titans' ? 'Titans' :datum.home_team == 'Dolphins' ? 'Dolphins' :datum.home_team == 'North Sydney Bears' ? 'North Sydney' :datum.home_team == 'Adelaide Rams' ? 'Adelaide Rams' :datum.home_team == 'Northern Eagles' ? 'Northern Eagles' :datum.home_team

datum.away_team == 'Brisbane Broncos' ? 'Broncos' :datum.away_team == 'Melbourne Storm' ? 'Storm' :datum.away_team == 'Penrith Panthers' ? 'Panthers' :datum.away_team == 'Parramatta Eels' ?
